name: Stefan Koch
title: Technischer Prüfer / Fachgutachter
organization_type: Federal research institute, technical evaluation of infrastructure bids

daily_reality.typical_day: Reviews technical proposals from bidders (Technische Angebote). Scores quality criteria: methodology, team qualification, project approach, timeline feasibility. Writes detailed Begründung for each score. Submits Wertungsbogen to Vergabestelle.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Reading 100+ page technical proposals to find the 5 pages that matter for his criteria. Filling out the same Word template for every bid. No way to compare proposals side-by-side.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: Evaluates 2-4 technical proposals per week during active procurement phases
critical_constraints: Must score ONLY against published criteria
Must provide written Begründung for each score
Must not communicate scores to other evaluators before consolidation
Independence of evaluation is legally required

psychology.tech_savviness: medium — engineer by training, comfortable with data but not SaaS tools
psychology.decision_speed: thorough — reads proposals completely, takes detailed notes
frustration_triggers: can see other evaluators' scores before submitting own (contamination)
no way to reference specific proposal sections
scoring form doesn't match criteria from Bekanntmachung
tool loses his draft if browser crashes
delight_triggers: AI extracts relevant sections from proposal per criterion
reference quotes from proposal automatically attached

first_screen: List of proposals assigned to ME for evaluation
For each: bid title, bidder name, my scoring progress (3/5 criteria complete)
NO visibility into other evaluators' scores
must_have: Text field for Begründung per criterion
nice_to_have: AI highlights relevant proposal sections per criterion
Score distribution visualization after all evaluators submit
Comparison view across bidders per criterion
expectations.current_pain_level: 7/10 — the Word/Excel process is slow and error-prone, especially for complex evaluations
